notes: NaN guard transcribed literally as (x == x) — relies on IEEE ordered compare (SPIR-V FOrdEqual is false for NaN; glslc default has no fast-math). Reads params[P_ALPHA=13], params[P_SIGMA_SQ=14].

dispatch: s_global[1] = { 4 * 256 }; s_local[1] = { 256 }; clEnqueueNDRangeKernel 1D (4 WGs, one per CFA channel) — galosh_raw_gpu.c:1086-1090
notes: Shared mem: int hist[4096] + int total_count = 16388 B. Shared int atomics (atomicAdd, core GLSL 450). Kernel-side #define O32_SIGMA_WG 64 is superseded by the host's local size 256 (kernel adapts via get_local_size, transcribed as constant 256). Writes params[P_SIGMA_CH0+ch], ch = gl_WorkGroupID.x.

Host passes NULL local size with global=1 → local_size_x=256 chosen per conventions; guard `get_global_id(0)!=0 → return` makes the 255 extra invocations no-ops. Vulkan dispatch = vkCmdDispatch(1,1,1). Reads P_SIGMA_CH0..3 (0..3), writes P_UNIFIED_SIGMA=4 + P_INV_SG=5.

dispatch: NOT DISPATCHED by host — kernel is created (galosh_raw_gpu.c:524) but never enqueued; production path is the §7.8b-e multi-WG pipeline. Design dispatch = single WG of 32 WIs (vkCmdDispatch(1,1,1)).
notes: LEGACY single-WG path. Local size 32 fixed by the kernel's own LDS array sizing (lds_*[O32_DR_WG=32]); running with any other WG size would read/write LDS out of bounds. Shared mem: 7×32 floats + 5 scalars = 916 B. Reads P_ALPHA=13/P_SIGMA_SQ=14, writes P_DARK_REF0..3 (6..9) + P_S_SCALE=10.

dispatch: dr_global2[1] = { (size_t)n_wg * wgsize } with n_wg=64 (O32_DR_MWG_NWG), wgsize=256 (O32_DR_MWG_WGSIZE); dr_local2[1] = { 256 }; enqueued 3× (dr_iter 0..2) — galosh_raw_gpu.c:1183-1199
notes: FP64: double accumulators + shared double lds[256*5] (10240 B) + partial_buf is a buffer of doubles ([n_wg*5]) → requires VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures.shaderFloat64 (SPIR-V Float64 capability). get_global_size(0) transcribed as gl_NumWorkGroups.x * 256. Reads params[P_S_SCALE=10].

dispatch: dispatch_1d_named(queue, k_o32_dr_finalize_dr_mwg, 1, 0) — global=1, local=NULL; enqueued 3× — galosh_raw_gpu.c:1209
notes: FP64 (reads double partial_buf, double aggregation) → requires shaderFloat64. NULL local with global=1 → local_size_x=256 per conventions; get_global_id!=0 guard makes extras no-ops (vkCmdDispatch(1,1,1)). Writes params[P_DARK_REF0..3] (6..9) as float.

dispatch: same dr_global2/dr_local2 as §7.8b: { 64 * 256 } global, { 256 } local; enqueued 2× (dr_iter 0, 1; skipped when dr_iter == 2) — galosh_raw_gpu.c:1217-1225
notes: FP64: double accumulators + shared double lds[256*2] (4096 B) + partial_resid_buf is a buffer of doubles ([n_wg*2]) → requires shaderFloat64. Reads params[P_S_SCALE=10] + P_DARK_REF0..3 (6..9).

dispatch: dispatch_1d_named(queue, k_o32_dr_resid_finalize_mwg, 1, 0) — global=1, local=NULL; enqueued 2× — galosh_raw_gpu.c:1236
notes: FP64 (double aggregation + sqrt on double) → requires shaderFloat64. NULL local with global=1 → local_size_x=256 per conventions; get_global_id!=0 guard (vkCmdDispatch(1,1,1)). Reads+writes params[P_S_SCALE=10]; s_min/s_max computed host-side as 0.05/50 × (sigma_sq/alpha).

dispatch: dispatch_2d_named(queue, k_o32_pad_2d_edge, align_up(dw, 16), align_up(dh, 16), 16, 16) where (dw,dh) = destination dims per call site: (hw,hh) at galosh_raw_gpu.c:1558-1560 and 1631-1633, (cq_w,cq_h) at 1600-1602; called in per-plane p=0..2 loops
notes: Stateless utility; multiple call sites with different src/dst buffers + dims.

dispatch: dispatch_2d_named(queue, k_o32_crop_2d_topleft, align_up(dw, 16), align_up(dh, 16), 16, 16) where (dw,dh) = crop dims per call site: (kq_w,kq_h) at galosh_raw_gpu.c:1527-1529, (ke_w,ke_h) at 1570-1572
notes: push field sh is unused in the kernel body (OpenCL has `(void)sh;`) — kept to preserve OpenCL argument order.
